---
title: "Quarto Live – SQL Playground (PGlite Minimal)"
format: html
resources:
  - assets/editor.js
  - assets/db.js
---

```{ojs}
editorUrl = FileAttachment("assets/editor.js").url()
dbUrl     = FileAttachment("assets/db.js").url()

editorMod = import(editorUrl)
dbMod     = import(dbUrl)

// Minimal-Seed (kannst du später ausbauen)
seedSql = `
  drop table if exists students;
  create table students (
    id   int primary key,
    name text,
    age  int
  );
  insert into students (id, name, age) values
    (1, 'Ada', 20),
    (2, 'Linus', 22),
    (3, 'Edsger', 25);
`

// DB einmal initialisieren (Promise ist ok in OJS)
dbPromise = dbMod.createDb(seedSql)

play = {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.style.display = "grid";
  div.style.gap = "0.75rem";

  // --- Editor ---
  const host = document.createElement("div");
  div.appendChild(host);

  const cm = editorMod.mountEditor(
    host,
    "select * from students order by id;"
  );

  // --- Buttons ---
  const row = document.createElement("div");
  row.style.display = "flex";
  row.style.gap = "0.5rem";
  div.appendChild(row);

  const btnRun = document.createElement("button");
  btnRun.textContent = "Run Query";
  row.appendChild(btnRun);

  const btnSeed = document.createElement("button");
  btnSeed.textContent = "Reset (re-seed)";
  row.appendChild(btnSeed);

  // --- Output ---
  const out = document.createElement("div");
  out.style.padding = "0.75rem";
  out.style.border = "1px solid #eee";
  out.style.borderRadius = "8px";
  out.style.background = "#fafafa";
  div.appendChild(out);

  const setText = (t) => {
    out.innerHTML = "";
    const pre = document.createElement("pre");
    pre.style.margin = "0";
    pre.textContent = t;
    out.appendChild(pre);
  };

  const renderRows = (rows) => {
    out.innerHTML = "";
    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
      setText("0 rows.");
      return;
    }

    const table = document.createElement("table");
    table.style.width = "100%";
    table.style.borderCollapse = "collapse";

    const cols = Object.keys(rows[0]);

    const thead = document.createElement("thead");
    const hr = document.createElement("tr");
    for (const c of cols) {
      const th = document.createElement("th");
      th.textContent = c;
      th.style.textAlign = "left";
      th.style.borderBottom = "1px solid #ddd";
      th.style.padding = "6px 8px";
      hr.appendChild(th);
    }
    thead.appendChild(hr);
    table.appendChild(thead);

    const tbody = document.createElement("tbody");
    for (const r of rows) {
      const tr = document.createElement("tr");
      for (const c of cols) {
        const td = document.createElement("td");
        const v = r[c];
        td.textContent = v === null || v === undefined ? "" : String(v);
        td.style.borderBottom = "1px solid #eee";
        td.style.padding = "6px 8px";
        tr.appendChild(td);
      }
      tbody.appendChild(tr);
    }
    table.appendChild(tbody);

    out.appendChild(table);
  };

  // --- Actions ---
  let db = null;

  const ensureDb = async () => {
    if (!db) db = await dbPromise;
    return db;
  };

  btnRun.onclick = async () => {
    btnRun.disabled = true;
    try {
      const sql = cm.getValue();
      const theDb = await ensureDb();
      const res = await dbMod.runSql(theDb, sql);

      if (res.kind === "rows") renderRows(res.rows);
      else if (res.kind === "ok") setText("OK.");
      else if (res.kind === "empty") setText("Enter SQL first.");
      else setText("Error:\n" + res.message);
    } finally {
      btnRun.disabled = false;
    }
  };

  btnSeed.onclick = async () => {
    btnSeed.disabled = true;
    try {
      // simplest reset: neue DB erzeugen
      db = await dbMod.createDb(seedSql);
      setText("DB reset + seeded.");
    } finally {
      btnSeed.disabled = false;
    }
  };

  setText("Ready. Try: select * from students;");
  return div;
}
```
